commit_scope: Harden native front-door nullable string JSON construction against Null inputs

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/language-model.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/codec.fk form-stdlib/structured-codec.fk form-stdlib/json-codec.fk form-stdlib/tests/json-emitter-band.fk
local_validation.notes: The JSON emitter band now proves nullable string construction across Null, empty string, and a deploy-SHA-like string. The front-door api-json-nullable-string helper delegates to the Form stdlib helper, preventing the observed native /api/health fatal[type_contract_violation]: as_str: Null path when deployed_sha or deployed_sha_source is Null during route evaluation.

ci_validation.notes: PR CI has not run yet for this branch.

commands: Hostinger Auto Deploy on main after merge
deploy_validation.notes: Deploy proof should confirm repeated public /api/health CORS probes return 200 with Access-Control-Allow-Origin instead of a transient native fatal response.

phase_gate.reason: Local validation passed; PR CI and deploy proof remain pending.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Native front-door health and route JSON construction should serialize missing nullable string values as JSON null instead of crashing with as_str: Null.
test_flows: Probe /api/health repeatedly with Origin: https://coherencycoin.com and verify HTTP 200 plus Access-Control-Allow-Origin.
Run the public deploy verifier and confirm CORS health no longer trips native-kernel-error.
